{{Quote|Now that you mention it, I suppose that would cause a thermoblast. Forget I ever suggested it.|Suskafoo|<ref name="SFS" />}}
'''Suskafoo''', or '''Foo''' to his friends, was a pale green [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]].

==Biography==
Suskafoo lived on a fringe [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] of the [[Roche asteroid field]]. His asteroid was the first contacted by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. From that time onwards, Suskafoo became something of a student of galactic culture, reading extensively on alien cultures and using his programming experience to master [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic]]. He then became a mediator between his hive and the "Rebel Hive."

Suskafoo was incredibly curious about technology, and loved working on theoretical problems. He was involved in the design of the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter]], a joint project with the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], and was a member of [[Dagger Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Dagger Squadron]], the Alliance's first B-wing squadron. Suskafoo also had a great interest in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], which he sustained by asking many questions whenever the opportunity presented itself.

==Behind the scenes==
Although not named in ''Star Wars: Rebellion 13'', [[Jeremy Barlow]] confirmed that the Verpine was Suskafoo on the [[Jedi Council Forums]].<ref name="tfn">{{JCFCite|url=posts/28408880|board=Literature|thread=Rebellion #13: Small Victories, part 3 (of 4)|user=[[Jeremy Barlow|Jeremy_Barlow]]|date=2008-05-01|time=6:53 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200802093028/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/rebellion-13-small-victories-part-3-of-4.27953155/page-2}}</ref>
